description: Description:White, slim Fit 100% cotton t-shirt, with cartoon printWashcare:Soft wash to avoid shrinkingFitting:Slim fitGrab that old bike of yours and set off on that bumpy ride to the countryside on a warm, summer day. After all, summer's all about fun and frolick. Pair this White t-shirt from probase with dark denims and you're all set to hit the road.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
